pending.body: Handle explicit-id aliases when validating and verifying `mapped_to_bead_id`. The prompt builder canonicalizes explicit bead IDs to `milestone_id.short_id` in [src/cli/project.rs:1179](/home/master/p/ralphs/ralph-burning/src/cli/project.rs#L1179), `extract_pe_bead_ids` and final-review validation only accept that exact token from the prompt in [src/contexts/project_run_record/task_prompt_contract.rs:277](/home/master/p/ralphs/ralph-burning/src/contexts/project_run_record/task_prompt_contract.rs#L277) and [src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs:648](/home/master/p/ralphs/ralph-burning/src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs#L648), and `verify_bead_exists` later passes the stored value straight to `br show` in [src/contexts/automation_runtime/planned_elsewhere.rs:70](/home/master/p/ralphs/ralph-burning/src/contexts/automation_runtime/planned_elsewhere.rs#L70). For explicit beads that still exist in `.beads` under their authored short ID, a valid planned-elsewhere mapping will be treated as stale and its comment will never post. Resolve both the qualified and short-ID forms here; the alias requirement is already acknowledged in [src/contexts/milestone_record/bundle.rs:494](/home/master/p/ralphs/ralph-burning/src/contexts/milestone_record/bundle.rs#L494).

status_summary: running: final review restart round 23 -> Plan and Implement
